entry.title: Hosting CodeJam in Chennai India BTP and ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I hope this message finds you well. We are interested in hosting an SAP CodeJam event at our office premises to enhance our team’s knowledge and hands-on experience with SAP technologies.

Location -Basis Cloud Solutions, No.162, Essar Building, 2nd Floor, Kunrathur High Road, Gerugambakkam, Chennai 600122
Topic - 1) Hands-on with the BTP CLI and APIs  2)  ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
Date - 24th January 2025
Time - 9 AM to 5 PM

Please let us know the availability of trainers, to guide our team through practical exercises and real-world scenarios.

Regards

Madhu Sudhan.R

entry.title: Re: SAP WM inbound delivery post error"Post the HUs for g...
entry.content: see my updated answer

entry.title: Re: BTP ABAP Environment alternative to SET LANGUAGE
entry.content: For messages its ok. But for text element? Any suggestion ? "Set language" was the way, now i dont know how to deal with it...

entry.title: API Integration
entry.content:
I work at a startup that provides business management solutions. One of our services includes the ability to upload JSON files, such as expense reports, from our platform to the user's accounting management system.

We have successfully implemented this functionality with platforms like QuickBooks and Xero using OAuth, and we would like to do the same with your system. However, as I understand, in your case, each client has a local instance, and interactions are conducted through the client's admin.

I would appreciate your clarification on the following points:

  1. How can we obtain an access token (via OAuth or PAT)?
  2. Where can we find your API documentation, and do you provide a sandbox environment for testing?

I would greatly appreciate a detailed response.

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content:
Hi @thomas_beck, i have question, if i wanted to the this copy step but, many to many, how would i do it?
I want this action, because when i copy my months to planning months, i want to do it instantly selection them all, and not doing it one by one

entry.title: How can I configure the Z field added to the BUT000 table via web ui in the CRM system to the BP.
entry.content: How can I configure the Z field added to the BUT000 table via web ui in the CRM system to the BP screen?

entry.title: Can we connect to ECC system without creating Technical & business system in SLD for that ECC system
entry.content:
Hi All,

Would like to know if we can connect to ECC system without creating Technical & business system in SLD and importing it in Integration Directory?

Instead of importing Business system for ECC system can i create Business component and create outbound interface and with RFC connection between ECC and my flow in SAP PO can i get the IDOC in system PO?

Regards

Mahesh

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Just Ask Feature Capability
entry.content:
Overview:

In this blog, we will explore about "Just Ask" feature with sample use cases. As described below  - Its a Powerful feature provided by SAP Analytics Cloud - to effectively search and depict visualizations based on the Natural Language query.

Recently i had an opportunity to demonstrate the capability to the business stakeholders , so i herewith sharing the same contents for the larger audience to benefit.

 

This enables the business user to generate the visualizations without any help from Analysts  / IT professionals. The following slide shows how to use the same.

To implement the "Just Ask" features there are some admin level authorizations required, please follow the below shown information as a pre-requistes.

 

Once configuration is enabled for "Just Ask". Please navigate to the below shown icon on the SAC system. the launch screen will looks like the below :

As shown below select the appropriate SAC model which you would like to extract analysis from. In this case

i have selected the standard model "BestRunJuice_SampleModel".

 

Once model is selected, the business user can ask questions in a natural language. for example in the below scenario - we have asked system to  getting the "Gross Margin"   by year in a line chart.

second example is instructing the system to change the visualization in the form of bar chart.

More importantly we can perform certain conditional checks  and depicts the visualizations on its own automatically. For example in the below screenshot - the business can ask question like  "discounts less than 1 million".  

 

as described - the user can perform different set of condition using the natural language and fetch desired results.

Summary of Key Benefits : 

1. Query the results based on natural language text

2. copy & past the visualization in to the new story.

3. Generate visualizations  based on certain conditions and rules. 

4. sort the data and show it in the required format

5. Rank the results and display in the charts.

6. Display row/column table format to show case the complete details as per business requirement.

 

Conclusion :

This feature is very handy for the business users  with dynamic requirements. They can generate their own reports and visualizations  without much dependency with analysts and experts from IT.

Thank you !   &  Happy Learning !

entry.title: Re: DBSQL_SQL_INTERNAL_DB_ERROR SQL code: 2
entry.content: How did you solve the problem? thanks

entry.title: Re: Post checks after RKS(Rolling Kernel Switch).
entry.content: The kernel version is 789 and SPlevel 200

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to read XLSX files without Microsoft Excel?
entry.content: abap2xlsx, XCO. What is the issue with abap2xlsx?

entry.title: Where can I learn the key aspects of Product Compliance?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Exploring SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance 2022 learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey will give insight on the concepts, processes and capabilities of product compliance with its solution areas product marketability, dangerous goods and safety data sheets.

Learning objectives

  • Learn and articulate the key aspects of Product Compliance.
  • Develop a comprehensive understanding of the business processes, roles, and integration points related to product compliance within the value chain.
  • Learn the fundamental concepts and relationships of compliance objects and requirements, while emphasizing the significance of compositions, substance management, and regulatory frameworks.
  • Apply the fundamental concepts, data models, integration processes, and compliance requirements necessary for assessing and managing the marketability of products and raw materials.
  • Illustrate the comprehensive workflow and integration of dangerous goods classification and processing across various business operations.
  • Learn the concepts, processes, and compliance requirements of safety data sheets (SDS) and gain the ability to manage and process SDS effectively within various business roles.

Prerequisites

  • Product Compliance in a Nutshell

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: CORS(Cross origin resource sharing)
entry.content:
With AS ABAP release 7.52 we will ship real CORS support built into the server. is this statement true or not?

Can somebody answer me that, This comment has confused me whether I need to incorporate the change or the CORS feature is now built in one.

entry.title: Re: How to use dynamic variables in WHERE in ABAP program .
entry.content: carrid = 'AC' OR carrid = 'AF'. is the value for gt_where

entry.title: Re: Easy Expert functionality does not contain specific c...
entry.content:
Hi Maria,

you can try loading the data or create your own Expert rule set to write the data as you need them.

Best regards,

Ralph

entry.title: Fixed Asset Depreciation Starting Date Change
entry.content:
Hi all

Could you please tell me how the depreciation start date is derived in the fixed assets master data in Sap Business One?

Below is an example.

The Fixed Asset Capitalization Date as per our Internal Auditor Report is 21.01.2023. Based on the Auditor Report the ordinary Depreciation values are found Below:

Auditor Report

ItemCode

Capitalization Date

Asset Group

Auditor

Ordinary Depreciation Value

Sap Ordinary Depreciation Value

Difference

 

1

40000101

21-01-2023

Spares

522.72

530

7.28

 

 

 

 

As per the Auditor Report, the Depreciation Values differ from Sap. If I change the Depreciation Start Date to the next day of the Capitalization Date (22-01-2023), the Sap Ordinary Depreciation Value and Auditor Values match.

 

Auditor Report

ItemCode

Capitalization Date

Asset Group

Auditor

Ordinary Depreciation Value

Sap Ordinary Depreciation Value

Difference

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

1

40000101

22-01-2023

Spares

522.72

523

0.28

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Kindly suggest any solutions to this.

entry.title: SAP GTS Version retrieve
entry.content:
Hi,

Good Day.

We are using the latest version of SAP GTS with the EHP8 upgrade, but by mistake, some transports from the development environment, which were created before the EHP8 version, were imported into the quality environment. As a result, these transports have overwritten the EHP8 version when checking the version management of certain objects. Is there a way to restore the EHP8 version as the active version again?

entry.title: Re: 收货的分录中，存货科目的利润中心是判断什么自动带出的？
entry.content: Hi Fang, 请问这种场景你用什么条件来区分呢？

entry.title: Re: IAS with 2 source systems: SF for users and Entra for...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can try the Merging data from multiple sources approach and see if it works for you: Centralized Provisioning with Identity Directory | SAP Help Portal 

Best regards,

Ivelina

entry.title: Global Class Static Attribute
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing a challenge in accessing the value stored in the static attribute of a global class. Please refer to the scenario below.

We are creating a Sales order from an Inbound IDOC using standard message type ORDERS. 

I have activated customer exit EXIT_SAPLVEDA_001 (VEDA0001) where I am filling the static attribute of a custom global class. 

I want to retrieve the value of this static attribute in USER_EXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT. But when I check this attribute in user exit it is blank. 

What might be the reason for it?

 I don't want to use Memory ID, is there any other approach?

entry.title: Integrating SAP SuccessFactors to Microsoft 365
entry.content: We are planning to integrate SAP SuccessFactors into MS 365, and we would like to ask how the testing is done. We know that once we have enabled the basic integration and the other required setup, the SF app will be available to the target users in the Microsoft Teams app. However, we are not sure if each instance (e.g., test, development, and production) will have a different SuccessFactors app in Microsoft Teams. Please advise. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Is SYBASE Mainframe Connect v15 compatible with CICS...

entry.title: Customer 00000XXXXX: Customer master table KNVV is missing.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While posting forwarding settlement document I am getting the following error "Customer 00000XXXXX: Customer master table KNVV is missing", Can anyone can let me know how to resolve this issue.

Note : The error I am getting this in Ocean freight Scenario.

Your prompt reply is highly appreciated.

Kind Regards,

PK

entry.title: DP91 price are taked from KE26 instead of VK13 conditions.
entry.content:
Dear members

When we are creating billing request using DP91 the price condition choose internal cost rate KP26 instaed of VK11 condition entered for WBS element and material.

First ZHON which is from VK13 is ignored and KP26 activity price which is considered as manualy enterred are on priorty.

if i change ZHON manual entries C to B then DP91 don't work.

Please help.

thank you.

entry.title: Re: Easy Expert functionality does not contain specific c...
entry.content:
Hi Maria,

 

You're right, I didn't think about that one. So you can only try doing a data load without deleting any data.

 

Best,


Ralph

entry.title: Re: Easy Expert functionality does not contain specific c...
entry.content: Hi Maria, you're right, I didn't think about that one. So you can only try doing a data load without deleting any data.Best,

entry.title: Re: Post checks after RKS(Rolling Kernel Switch).
entry.content: Are there any general checks that we need to do after implementing Rolling Kernel Switch, independant of systems like there are many prerequisites present just like that anything for post checks?

entry.title: 3244147 - How to retrieve the classification data from a batch?
entry.content:
Hi experts

I have a question to this note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3244147/E

Multiple CDS views can be associated in order to retrieve the classification data from a batch.
I_BATCHDISTINCT can be used to retrieve the Object No.  With the Object No. I_CLFNOBJECTCHARCVALFORKEYDATE can be used to retrieve the Characteristic Internal ID, Char. Value.
Then I_CLFNCHARCDESCFORKEYDATE can be used to get the characteristic description and  I_CLFNCHARCVALUEFORKEYDATE , I_CLFNCHARCVALUEDESCFORKEYDATE can be used to get the value description. 

In S4H Public cloud I tried to create a custom CDS view with scenario "Data Extraction" - the mentioned views would be associated to  I_BATCHDISTINCT . But I am getting the error message:

Selected associated Data Source: I_ClfnObjectCharcValForKeyDate must belong to the same bussiness area as Primary Data Source

How can I get these views into one view? I need them to extract to BW4H later on.

Attached please find two screens...

Thanks for your help, Tom

entry.title: SAP Market Rates Management differs with ECB exchange value.
entry.content:
How to compare the market datafeed currency exchange rates of the historic data with the currency exchange rates in the App Currency Exchange Rates.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Market Rates Management differs with ECB exchange...
entry.content: Use App Request Historical Market Data - Datafeed Fiori Apps library link

entry.title: Re: GRDC Run Data Mapping, Import status error
entry.content: In the Import tab?

entry.title: Re: Creation of bgRFC and calling in a program
entry.content:
Great article. Thanks.

I have one situation with the standard WS_BGRFC_INBOUND000 destination. I have one async consumer proxy for which I want to create some custom table logging every time the WS gets called. This includes both business application and SRT_MONI restart. Can I somehow enhance this standard process? Or can I create a separate destination with custom handler?

entry.title: Customer Onboarding for SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain
entry.content:
Are you a new SAP IBP Customer ready to start your project implementation?

To make sure you start with the right foot on your SAP project, we have designed a Customer Onboarding Journey dedicated to SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain (SAP IBP) solution.

What should you do?

Visit the SAP IBP Onboarding Resource Center, your one-stop shop for a smooth onboarding process. Access ungated enablement resources, including guides on how to use SAP for Me, how to access your system, and useful information on what to expect and how to prepare for the entire project implementation.

Register for the Onboarding Webcasts, which are quarterly live sessions designed to get you up to speed with the onboarding process. Plan, register, and join these sessions to gain insights and clarify any questions you may have. If you can't join live, on-demand content is also available.

Your Onboarding Journey in Four Phases

Either the content available in the SAP IBP Onboarding Resource Center and the content delivered in the Onboarding Webcast, both follow the same Customer Onboarding Journey:

 This is the content in more detail:

Phase 1. Get Started with SAP 

The main objective is to make sure customers understand the SAP IBP provisioning process and become familiar with the expected communications from SAP, enabling them to log in to the systems. Additionally, we aim to make sure customers are aware of SAP channels, particularly SAP for Me, and know how to get support from SAP for both technical and non-technical issues.

Main topics covered:

  • Understand your onboarding journey
  • Learn about SAP channels and s-user setup
  • Get access to your system
  • Get familiar with SAP Support

Phase 2. Plan your Implementation

The main objective is to provide the customer a high-level knowledge on how to better run, manage and accelerate their SAP IBP project implementation using the tools and resources included in their subscription.

Main topics covered:

  • Run your project implementation with SAP Activate
  • Manage your project with SAP Cloud ALM
  • Accelerate your project with SAP Best Practices
  • SAP tools to support your Data Integration
  • Roles & system testing

Phase 3. Get Enabled

The main objective is to present the customer with free learning and enablement resources to help them effectively use the SAP IBP solution.

Main topics covered:

  • SAP IBP Solution overview
  • SAP Help Portal
  • SAP Community
  • Offerings in SAP Enterprise Support

Phase 4. Prepare to Go Live

The main objective is to ensure a smooth Go-Live and prepare customers to run their business effectively.

Main topics covered:

  • Get ready for final project tasks
  • SAP offerings & services for go-live support
  • Post-live resources
  • Keep innovating after go-live

In Conclusion

The onboarding journey with SAP is meticulously designed to ensure that you’re fully prepared for a successful implementation, since contract signature to go-live. Take the time to explore, plan, and engage with the resources at your disposal. The road to a successful go-live with SAP IBP starts here.

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content: Hi @Bernardo_Santos1, you can do this via an Advanced Formula (e.g. via using dimension properties to map month to planning month) or X-Model Copy Step (same source and target model, map each month to planning month). For the regular copy step this is not possible to map across different dimensions.

entry.title: Re: GRDC Run Data Mapping, Import status error
entry.content: yes, I have no found error in import log, and in traceability log

entry.title: Is there option to avoid the popup No routing found while creating production order
entry.content:
While creating production order in CO07 without material below popup is coming.

In ECC the system automatically choose default operation (OPJG) in such case and not showing any popup. But in Hana it shows this popup. Is it possible to avoid this and to choose default operation directly?

Also in ECC routing selection option is there in OPL8

But in Hana its not there.

Do this have any impact on this popup?

entry.title: Re: Is SYBASE Mainframe Connect v15 compatible with CICS...
entry.content: I'm getting an error while accessing the link you provided:

entry.title: Re: Is SYBASE Mainframe Connect v15 compatible with CICS...
entry.content: No data Unable to fetch data at the moment. This might be due to a server error or a network issue. Please try again later.

entry.title: Re: Is SYBASE Mainframe Connect v15 compatible with CICS...
entry.content: https://me.sap.com/notes/2253663

entry.title: Testing API Binding: Help with new layout
entry.content:
New interface vs old interface

I'm trying to set up a Universal REST API integration with my database. I'm facing issues with the new layout when trying to create a record (POST) using Test API. With the old layout I could Test with formulas or static texts. In the new layout it seems only to accept static values.

Additionally when I Test the API with the same schema in both layouts, I get no errors with the old layout, however I'm getting invalid payload errors with the new layout

What's changed and how can I get the option to test API payloads with formulas?

entry.title: Re: Easy Expert functionality does not contain specific c...
entry.content: Hi Ralph, thinking on dataload method, I'm not sure that's even a possibility now on checking transaction CG33 > Parameters button. There is nothing on there re Value Assignment controls in general, let alone settings options to make this work. Going back to creating an expert rule, in SPRO > EHS > Manage User Exits, there are a number of Function Modules prefixed with C1E5_SUB_EXPERT**. For standard EHS Expert Rules, the FM uses 'C1E5_SUB_EXPERT_EVALUATE'. Would one of those be a workable solution in terms of inserting an additional Validity Area entry into an existing and specific instance? I'm sorry for the twenty questions, it's like a puzzle piece right now that I'm keen to solve. Thanks in advance. Best, Maria

entry.title: Re: Is SYBASE Mainframe Connect v15 compatible with CICS...
entry.content: I still cannot open it - I'm getting the NO DATA error.

entry.title: Where can I learn how to use the Environment Management module in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Discovering SAP EHS Management, environment management learning journey.

Overview
Gain insight into environmental compliance and emission management processes within the SAP EHS Management, environment management module. The learner will be able to successfully create and manage location data, compliance requirements, and compliance scenarios.

Learning objectives

  • Explore the regulatory and permit compliance process.  
  • Explore the emission management process.  
  • Comprehend the Master Data Concept and the Master Data Creation in SAP EHS Management, environment management
  • Identify the creation process of compliance requirements. 
  • Create compliance requirements, environmental limits, regulatory lists, and equations. 
  • Create and setup the data collection process.  
  • Create and setup sampling, calculations, and location-aggregations. 

Prerequisites

  • Nice to know information 
    Introduction to SAP S/4HANA Environment, Health & Safety

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Is SYBASE Mainframe Connect v15 compatible with CICS...
entry.content:
The link is working fine for me. Not sure what is occurring. The contents for this KBA:

++++++

Symptom

Support plans for the latest releases of IBM's CICS and z/OS on the products listed below:

  • Mainframe Connect Server Option for CICS
  • Mainframe Connect Client Option for CICS
  • Mainframe Connect DB2/UDB Option for CICS

Environment

  • The latest version of Mainframe Connect products at the time of this KBA is version 15 SP06.
  • The latest version of Replication Agent for DB2 at the time of this KBA is version 15 SP08.

Resolution

Since these products do not have any OS and CICS dependences, they are expected to work on the newer CICS and z/OS versions.  

The MFC products for CICS use IBM's CICS Command Level and CICS Socket Interface API's.
Therefore the products are isolated from the OS and CICS versions.

Latest Mainframe certifications for MFC and Rep Agent for DB2.

Software Version Supported

MFC

RADB2

Latest z/OS versions supported

 

See PAM

See PAM

Latest CICS version supported

 

6.1

NA

Latest DB2 version supported

 

12

12

Oldest z/OS version supported

 

See PAM

See PAM

Oldest CICS version supported

 

5.1

NA

Oldest DB2 version supported

 

11

11

Note: Rep Agent for DB2 (One-off EBF 29069) has been certified on DB2 v12 (M100 up to M508)  and z/OS 2.4.
One-off EBF 29069 is expected to support all function levels for DB2 v12 unless IBM makes major changes to DB2 within a functional level.
Open a support case with SAP to get one-off EBF 29069.
For more details on  EBF 29069 please see the  attached cover letter (EBF29069_README.docx)
NOTE:  Replication Agent for DB2 has been End of Mainstream Maintenance (EoMM), as of December 31 2021, Please see SAP Note 3059657)

See Also

KBA 3408369 - End of mainstream maintenance for Sybase Mainframe Connect 15.0.

entry.title: Re: How can I configure the Z field added to the BUT000 t...
entry.content:
I would answer, use EEWB 'Easy Enhancement Workbench' or AET 'Application Enhancement Tool '.

(But sorry, I've only done these enhancements in reverse order, EEWB then enhance BP Web UI)

entry.title: Re: Enhancing SAP Digital Manufacturing with Extended iDoc: Addressing the Absence of Operation Long
entry.content: @tandras_sap currently we don't have any standard ways to display this information in POD, but it is considered for future release enhancements.

Corresponding SAP Notes are implemented

Sirui

entry.title: Re: Sharepoint CSV-File integration in Datasphere's Data...
entry.content:
Look to the 3425630 - Sharepoint Open Connectors supports only English language for now - SAP for Me 

For us it was the solution

entry.title: Replacement for CO06 in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
In SAP R/3, we use the transaction CO06 (Manual Availability Assignment). Is there currently an equivalent or replacement for this functionality in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

The app "Pick Components by Production Order" does not meet our needs, as we are not using production orders in our process.

Thank you in advance for your insights!

SS

entry.title: Re: How to use dynamic variables in WHERE in ABAP program .

entry.title: Re: CAP: cds deploy to hana: HDI Deployment failed
entry.content:
Had the same. The problem with allowing connections to IPs in HANA instance.
Go to the Hana Instance Tools, press Manage Configurations, go to Connections and select "Allow all IP addresses".
This helped me to

entry.title: Re: Authentication using JWT in SAP API Management
entry.content: Hello Experts, any suggestions on this please?

entry.title: Re: SLD Data Supplier to to SAP's Support Backbone, for A...
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

While waiting for a better solution, I wanted to mention that our AS Java has sent their SLD Data to the SAP Support Backbone by using a reverse web proxy on our site.

I created a reverse proxy xxx.mydomain that proxies requests to https://supply.landscape.services.sap.
In the AS Java, I have configured the following SLD_DataSupplier connection.
---
URL : http://xxx.mydomain/sld/ds or https://xxx.mydomain/sld/ds
System ID: Empty
Client : Empty
Language : Empty
User Name: Technical communication S-User
Password: Pasword of the Technical communication S-User
---

In the AS Java, ping test of SLD_DataSupplier connection worked.
Collecting and Sending the SLD also returned a success.

In the maintenance planner, I see that the System has been updated.

Therefore it seems to work. It is complicated compared to using a proxy server in SLD_DataSupplier.
But I have not found an easier way.

If you would know a better way to configure this SLD_DataSupplier, please do not hesitate to share.

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Re: How to use dynamic variables in WHERE in ABAP program .
entry.content: Yes, there are functions and classes that can do this, but it appears the table option is valid too.  Would know more by seeing the details of the short dump.

entry.title: Re: How to pass SaS Token using User credentials Option in CPI AMQP Sender Adapter
entry.content: were you able to fix the authentication issue please?

entry.title: Re: Error in FB75 while raising to E-Invoice
entry.content: Thanks for your reply. However, I am posting Credit Note from Finance only using T.code FB75 with no integration from SD to FI.

entry.title: Re: Enabling Identity Authentication integration in LMS
entry.content: As I understand, connectors are generally used to bring users from BizX to Learning, meaning that these users would authenticate via BizX (not Learning only users). It's not clear how Learning only users would be created here, but there are different manners, other than via connectors. Once Learning only users are created, they'd be synced to IAS (the 4th step explains it). I also understand these are all implementations decisions, so there could exist ideal approaches depending on the business setup of each customer.

entry.title: Using APIs to Migrate Incentive Management Commissions Objects
entry.content:
We have a customer that wants to migrate Commissions Objects, such as Rules, Plans, Formulae, Plan Docs, etc. via the Incentive Management APIs.

In looking at the APIs in Business Accelerator Hub, I see one for Plans & Rules but it doesn't appear that Rules that include formulas are included.

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks!

Ron Hagan

entry.title: Re: FIORI LOGIN ERROR WITH DIFFERENT CLIENT IN SAME SYSTEM

are you sure you can logon to 777 fiori launchpad?

when you logon to 777 fiori launchpad,did you see sap-client=777 in the url?

entry.title: Re: Focused insights tactical dashboard data validation f...
entry.content:
Hello,

For initial configuration, please find the Focused Insights Configuration guides at the following SAP Help Portal page:

https://help.sap.com/docs/Focused_Build_Focused_Insights#use_task-configuration-and-use-of-focused-insights

You can also review the "Troubleshooting > Tactical" section of the following page for Data Validation steps for each Tactical Dashboard scenario:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sm/3518048337.html?locale=en-US

Kind regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP GTS Version retrieve
entry.content:
Hi Shubh,

Once again you have to collect the changes in the development system. and import those change requests in the quality system by overwrite option so that your version management will be synced.

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Unable to delete and update/Insert at once using 'cl_md_bp_maintain=>maintain' class
entry.content: In fact, you have tried only the first answer which just explains how to differentiate "Telephone and Mobile Phone", which is not your case. Just check the next answers which contain some code and compare with your own code.

Hello @barath-kakaday 

No, it is not

see: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/cpm/4723711150.html

 

Marc

entry.title: Re: How to use dynamic variables in WHERE in ABAP program .
entry.content:
Hello, the issue is with the spaces for the Where clause parameters passed,

-> How you have passed :

-> How it should be:

Kindly, refer below document where SAP has provided some sample code utilizing this technique:

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/implementing-unmanaged-query

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Can customers use S2SVPN and VNET Peering to connect to PCE at the same time?
entry.content:
As the subject,

As I know, According to R&R Matrix "INFRA_1.2.0.5_PCE" the RISE customer is entitled to 1 Azure VNET Peering and additional connections can be purchased. 

Does Customer use 1 Azure VNET Peering and S2SVPN at the same time?

entry.title: Re: Easy Expert functionality does not contain specific c...
entry.content:
Hi Maria,

If you have different data origin and provider per instance you could use deletion type 2 in the parameters of CG33. That is something you need to check. If several instances have the same data origin and provider then it will be impossible, I'm afraid. As to the function modules: I don't read ABAP so I can't comment here.

Best regards,

Ralph

entry.title: Re: Automatic Creation of PO by Goods Receipts
entry.content:
Thank you very much for sharing your knowledge! I was trying to automatically create the purchase order with MIRO but I was not allowed. I had followed all the instructions from SAP but I was not able. I got the error message that the supplier was missing even though I had entered it. The only thing that was missing was the "LIFNR" in OMJJ can you please explain what is this setting doing?

Thank you again!

entry.title: Automate updates to my dashboard imported from an excel
entry.content:
Hi

You could help me with the following doubt, in the company we have a calculation sheet (excel), the spreadsheet is updated constantly by the Purchasing Team, the spreadsheet was uploaded to the SAC and a panel was created from it, therefore every time the spreadsheet is updated by the Purchasing Team I must access the SAC and re-import the form so that the panel in the SAC is updated, for the moment the work was very manual, Would you have any idea how I could automate? please.

Thank you, my best regards

entry.title: Re: Replacement for CO06 in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello @t_jungesblut 

Could you please provide detailed information about your business requirement to help us understand it better?

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Strict mode in RAP BO behavior definition
entry.content:
Hi,

We read from the documentation that adding the strict mode ensures that a RAP business object is upgrade-safe. I know it is best practice to use strict ( 2 ), but there are times where we need to use strict ( 1 ) and we are just wondering whether if strict ( 1 ) is considered lifecycle stable and upgrade-safe?

entry.title: Empowering a Greener Future: SAP Utilities' Newsletter Highlights Innovation & Sustainability
entry.content:
Dear Utilities Community,

The latest edition of the SAP Utilities Newsletter offers a moment to reflect on the remarkable progress and achievements in the utilities industry. This year has been a year of change, marked by significant progress in the areas of customer satisfaction, sustainability, and technological innovation.

 

Key topics 

Use of AI and Cloud Technologies
Integrating artificial intelligence into utility company processes has been a decisive step forward. AI-powered solutions have optimized operations, improved decision-making, and enhanced service delivery. This issue delves into how these technologies are transforming the industry.

Celebrating Partnerships and Customer Success Stories
The newsletter also recognizes the invaluable role of SAP's customers and partners. These collaborations have driven innovation and created tailored solutions to meet the specific needs of the utilities sector. Success stories from companies such as EdERSA, Christchurch City Council, and IWB highlight the tangible benefits - from operational improvements to increased customer satisfaction.

Commitment to Sustainability
Sustainability remains a top priority for SAP. This year, SAP introduced solutions to reduce CO2 emissions and promote renewable energy. These efforts go beyond compliance, paving the way for a greener future. The newsletter highlights various projects and partnerships that have contributed to these goals, showcasing SAP's dedication to environmental protection.

Looking to the Future
Looking ahead to 2025, the SAP Utilities team is looking forward to the upcoming international SAP for Energy and Utilities Conference in Rotterdam. This event promises to be a center of knowledge sharing and networking, setting the stage for another year of innovation and growth.

In summary, the SAP Utilities Newsletter 2024 reflects the progress and potential of the utilities sector. It reflects a year of hard work, collaboration, and forward-thinking that has set the course for a better and more sustainable future. If you haven't received the newsletter, please read it online.

We look forward to providing you with news about SAP and the utilities industry again next year. If you are not yet registered, you can sign up here.

Happy Holidays and a wonderful New Year!

Your SAP Utilities Team

entry.title: Re: Async onInit - Route not trigerred
entry.content:
Had the same issue and resolved it likes this. Dont know if this is helpful for you:

static async fireEventAsync(eventName: string, eventParameters: object, component: Component): Promise<FireEventReturnType> {
	let aEventListeners,
		event,
		promises = [];

	// @TS-ignore
	const eventPool = new ObjectPool(Event);

	aEventListeners = (component as any).mEventRegistry[eventName];

	if (Array.isArray(aEventListeners)) {
		// Avoid issues with 'concurrent modification' (e.g. if an event listener unregisters itself).
		aEventListeners = aEventListeners.slice();
		event = eventPool.borrowObject(eventName, component, eventParameters); // borrow event lazily

		for (let oInfo of aEventListeners) {
			try {
				// Assuming each handler returns a promise
				promises.push(oInfo.fFunction.call(null, event));
			} catch (error) {
				Log.error("Error in event handler:", error as Error);
			}
		}
	}

	// Wait for all promises (i.e., async handlers) to resolve
	await Promise.all(promises);

	return {
		bPreventDefault: (event as any)?.bPreventDefault,
		mParameters: (event as any)?.mParameters,
		returnValue: promises[0]
	};
}

And usage of this method

const asyncEventPreFileProcessing = await Util.fireEventAsync("preFileProcessing", { file: file }, this.component);
			const isDefaultPrevented = asyncEventPreFileProcessing.bPreventDefault;

And in final code like:

// Event to check before uploading to app
this.spreadsheetUpload.attachCheckBeforeRead(async function (event) {
    return new Promise(async (resolve, reject) => {
        // Example
        console.log("Start async wait");
        await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 5000));
        console.log("End async wait");
        // Don't forget to resolve the promise
        resolve();
    });
}, this);

It is used in my Spreadsheet Importer Component:

Method fireEventAsync Implementation

Usage of this method

Sample usage in Code Documentation

entry.title: Re: Chinese names in learning as alternative name
entry.content: Many thanks for your advice! Will double check if we use the middle name field 🙂

entry.title: Re: Replacement for CO06 in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content: Previously, we used CO06 per material to remove quantities from confirmed schedule lines for one sales order item and reassign these quantities to another schedule line in a different sales order item. We are now looking for a way to perform this process in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

entry.title: Re: Payment block substitution Public Cloud
entry.content: Also, another question: is there any way to modify FI document before posting (change fields or add additional line items for example)? except the BADI i mentioned in the header. Couldn't find anything about it.

entry.title: Re: I would like to add a master item in BP master.
entry.content: @yukitsumura : please check the below standard documentation link https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/e6175604fc874bfe84aa14d2f9ae1fbd/b53f0144174b4ff180cecb909f430b55.html

entry.title: ABAP dump when calling odata v4 service using local proxy from a fiori app based on RAP BO
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting this error whenever I call an odata service from a RAP BO using remote/local proxy.

This error is not there when I call the same code via a console app in ADT.

      DATA: lt_product     TYPE CL_API_PRODUCT_MPC=>TT_A_PRODUCTTYPE,
            lo_client_proxy  TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_client_proxy,
            lo_read_request  TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_request_read_list,
            lo_read_response TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_response_read_lst.

    DATA lv_relative_service_root TYPE string.



    TRY.

        lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_client_proxy_fact=>create_v4_local_proxy( VALUE #( service_id = 'API_PRODUCT' service_version = '0001' repository_id = 'SRVD_A2X' ) ).

        lo_read_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'PRODUCT' )->create_request_for_read( ).
        lo_read_request->set_top( iv_top = 5 ).
        lo_read_response = lo_read_request->execute( ).

        "Retrieve the business data
        lo_read_response->get_business_data( IMPORTING et_business_data = lt_product ).

        LOOP AT lt_product INTO DATA(ls_product).
*          out->write( ls_product ).
        ENDLOOP.

      CATCH /iwbep/cx_cp_remote INTO DATA(lx_cp_remote).
        " Error handling
        DATA(lv_text1) = lx_cp_remote->get_longtext( ).
      CATCH /iwbep/cx_gateway INTO DATA(lx_gateway).
        " Error Handling
        DATA(lv_text2) = lx_gateway->get_longtext( ).
    ENDTRY.

  I didn't get the error when calling an odata v2 service using local proxy.

entry.title: index.js is not called in index.html in runtime
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have created the walkthrough project in the BTP.

index.html is not able to call index.js, can you check and tell the mistake.

index.html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
	<meta charset="utf-8">
	<title>UI5 Walkthrough</title>
	<script
		id="sap-ui-bootstrap"
		src="resources/sap-ui-core.js"
		data-sap-ui-theme="sap_horizon"
		data-sap-ui-libs="sap.m"
		data-sap-ui-compat-version="edge"
		data-sap-ui-async="true"
		data-sap-ui-on-init="module:ui5/walkthrough/index"
		data-sap-ui-resource-roots='{
			"ui5.walkthrough": "./"
		}'>

	</script>
</head>
<body>
<div>Hello World</div>
</body>
</html>

index.js

sap.ui.define([], () => {
	"use strict";
	alert("UI5 is ready");
});

Thanks

Kaushik

SAP Portal/SAP UI5/SAP Fiori/Web Dynpro Java

entry.title: SAP Utilities Roadmap 2025 Onwards
entry.content:
The utilities industry will continue to play a key role in SAP's strategy and development topics. It is therefore important to us to provide customers, partners, and the entire SAP Utilities ecosystem with information about the planned innovations.

This year we have once again created a matrix of the respective industry topics and the corresponding innovations. This matrix represents an excerpt of the most important innovations and does not claim to be complete. Over time, further innovations may be added, and delivery periods may also change.

After an overview of the highlights, we will list the details for each topic; behind almost all innovations you will find a link to the SAP Roadmap Explorer with further details.

 

SAP Asset Performance Management

  • AI-powered Joule digital assistant for navigational and transactional use cases Link
  • AI-enabled visual inspection for asset condition monitoring (general availability) Link
  • Advanced asset health monitoring scenarios with embedded IoT Link
  • Custom AI models and algorithms Link

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

  • Utilizing artificial intelligence to streamline creation and planning of maintenance orders Link
  • Enable external collaboration with subcontractors and service providers Link
  • Enabling integration of service with advanced execution orders (billable maintenance) Link
  • Supporting linear fields in Find Maintenance Order and Operation Link (and many more roadmap items supporting linear assets)
  • Isolation management in a permit to work (lockout tagout) Link

SAP Business Network Asset Collaboration

  • Mass import export APIs for main technical objects Link
  • Digital nameplate Link
  • Enablement of digital twin handover with procurement Link

SAP Field Service Management

  • AI-assisted browsing of knowledge bases Link
  • Multiple technicians in auto-scheduling – crews Link
  • Fully automated planning on the service map Link

SAP Service and Asset Manager

  • Field service crew support Link
  • Management of non-stock items Link
  • OCR for quick data capture Link

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

  • Automatic creation of maintenance notifications for condition-enabled measuring points Link
  • Enable in-house refurbishment Link
  • OCR for quick data capture Link

SAP Maintenance Assistant mobile app

  • AI-enabled maintenance and service execution Link
  • Support for Esri maps integration Link
  • Supporting SAP Dynamic Forms Link

 

Metering

  • Graphical display of utilities interval data Link
  • More flexible status handling for energy data management formulas Link
  • Archiving of technical master data that is specific to the utilities industry Link
  • Enabling custom fields and logic for point-of-delivery and BPEM case data Link

Analytics

  • Extraction of Energy data management related master data Link
  • Using SAP Datasphere in the utilities industry – utilities sales contracts Link
  • Native sales statistics and unbilled revenue reporting in SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud Link

Convergent Invoicing

  • End-to-end reconciliation from event to GL in contract accounting and invoicing Link
  • Increase automation of invoicing processes by leveraging machine learning and predictive models Link
  • Reduce time and costs associated with simulation of invoice forecasts for subscription or usage alterations Link

Financials (FI-CA)

  • Display of utilities invoices Link and budget billing plans Link in a business partner financial overview
  • Budget billing plans in the Business Partner Financial Overview app Link
  • Display of utilities invoices in a business partner financial overview Link

 

Customer and Service Management

  • Generative AI–driven digital agent for customer self-service and customer engagement Link
  • Service management for utilities – round-off Link
  • Period control for life cycle events Link
  • Streamlining contract migration and bulk data processing Link
  • Extending pricing capabilities Link
  • Digital payments for service transactions  Link
  • Incorporating the Joule assistant Link

Sales for Commodity & Non-commodity

  • Alignment with the product model of SAP S/4HANA Link
  • Product replication using SAP Master Data Integration Link
  • Intelligent sales execution – target planning Link
  • Intelligent sales execution – product- and volume-based pipeline management Link
  • AI product configuration Link
  • New user interface for the document generation process on the Quote Link
  • Usage-based pricing with integration with SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management Link

Commerce Telco & Utilities Accelerator

  • Streamlined material replication for smoother integration Link

Marketing

  • Personalization and segmentation accelerator for utilities Link
  • Advanced personalization and segmentation accelerator for utilities Link

CX AI Toolkit

  • Shopping assistant agent: personalized recommendations Link

 

Distributed Energy Resources (DER)

  • Cancellation of measurement concept instances before device installation Link
  • Analytics for Long-Running Processes Link
  • Enabling validation checks of instances through an API Link
  • Export of a network graph for usage in third-party systems Link
  • Advanced asset health monitoring scenarios with embedded IoT Link
  • AI-powered Joule digital assistant for navigational and transactional use cases Link
  • Integrating AI-based electric vehicle supply equipment (EVSE) asset management Link
  • E-Mobility integration to complementary ecosystem solutions such as energy management Link

Circular Economy

  • Generate a generic waste transportation document to enable shipment of waste Link
  • Integration of waste management and purchasing processes Link
  • Initial Release of SAP Spend Control Tower to provide an enterprise view of total spend Link

Climate Action

  • Carbon emissions allowance management Link
  • Environment management for energy consumption data Link
  • Carbon border adjustment mechanism (CBAM): content with an operator focus Link

Sustainability Accounting

  • Collection and allocation of greenhouse gas emissions in a carbon journal Link
  • Importing emission quantities through file upload Link
  • Accounting for carbon allowances in a carbon journal Link
  • Enabling automatic carbon collections and automated allocations Link
  • Posting and analysis of carbon quantities on external suppliers / affiliated companies Link

E-mobility

  • Charging cost reimbursement for employee charging Link
  • Enabling import and processing of charging sessions from external charge point management systems Link
  • Smart Charging configuration based on user defined parameters Link
  • CO2-based electric vehicle (EV) charging and pricing tariffs handling Link
  • Compatibility with ISO 15118 to support plug-and-charge functionality Link
  • EV Driver authorizations and invoicing in charging groups Link
  • Unidirectional smart charging (V1G) and bi-directional smart charging (V2G) Link

Social Responsibility

  • Electronic submission of recordable injury or illness cases to OSHA as per the legal requirements (cloud) Link
  • Operational risk management: approval of safety instructions for chemicals and equipment (cloud) Link
  • Support for standard, analytical content for workplace safety and social responsibility (cloud) Link
  • Operational risk assessment: visualization of risk history Link

Dangerous Goods Management and Recycling Administration

  • Storing attributes of batteries as basis for the dangerous goods classification Link
  • Additional regulation-specific details for dangerous goods regulations Link
  • Defining customer-specific dangerous goods description templates Link
  • Support for USG-04 in IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations Link

Holistic Steering and Reporting

  • Narrative disclosures, ESG-metric definition, and data collection Link
  • Custom metrics with specific dimension breakdown Link

Please consider that this information and SAP‘s strategy and possible future developments are subject to change and may be changed by SAP at any time for any reason without notice. This document is provided without a warranty of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to, the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.

entry.title: Re: SAP GTS Version retrieve
entry.content: I got it, Sriram. While transport requests are fine, the core question remains: How can we restore the EHP8 version as the active version in the Quality environment? Since we cannot transport the EHP8 version as a transport request, what would be the best approach to achieve this?

entry.title: About Add -Ins by Using JS
entry.content:

How we can Add Add-Ins On SAP using Integrations with js or php  could you help me and Is there any documents ,So i can Connect with SAP with my products?

entry.title: Re: configurable products and dynamic pricing
entry.content: Thank you for your help, @samuelyang. Actually, what we need to model is a product that, when added to the cart, changes its price based on a value that can range from 1 to 90. I was thinking of using variants, but that would mean 90 variants, and I’m not sure if there’s a better way to handle this. Anyway, thank you very much.

entry.title: how to save mail as draft
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an use case where after processing I need to create response mail and save it in draft folder.

How can I save mail in an outlook folder using SAP BPA.

Regards,

entry.title: Region codes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
How to Configure New Regions or edit the region codes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Region codes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: Use the configuration activity/SSCUI 103826 "Insert Regions (Subnational Administration Units) in S/4HANA Cloud" to add or edit the region for the country.

entry.title: Re: Not able to purchase one attempt for SAP certification exam for India region From SAP Training S
